avoid: never name a real person (roles only)
never put words in a family member's mouth
visual: no family members/children in frame
positioning: Empowering fitness journeys with comprehensive insights and support.
angles_to_pursue: Highlighting the benefits of various fitness equipment without showing faces.

Showcasing local services and partnerships that complement fitness goals.

research_requests: Identify key competitors in the local fitness market beyond fitnessfirstme.
Gather insights on customer preferences for fitness products and services.
Explore effective strategies for engaging non-Arabic speaking audiences in the fitness sector.
